HGSS.573.0000:
They built the new Radio Tower to
replace the old, creaky one.
HGSS.573.0001:
Have you visited the Pokéathlon Dome?
It is a huge sports facility where\r
Pokémon compete with each other.\f
It was quite a sight!
HGSS.573.0002:
I know there’s a new Bike Shop,
but I can’t find it anywhere.
HGSS.573.0003:
The fact that you have a Bike...
means you got it from a Bike Shop,\r
right?\f
All right!
I can say that there is a Bike Shop\r
somewhere in this city!
HGSS.573.0004:
Is that man in black dressed up
like a Team Rocket member?\r
How silly!
HGSS.573.0005:
Was that man in black really part
of Team Rocket?\r
I can’t believe it!
HGSS.573.0006:
The Radio Tower in Goldenrod City is
a landmark.\f
They’re running a promotional campaign
right now.\f
They’ll modify your Pokégear so it can
also serve as a radio.
HGSS.573.0007:
The Radio Tower in Goldenrod City is
a landmark.\f
They’re running a promotional campaign
right now.\f
They’ll modify your Pokégear so it can
also serve as a radio.\f
Oh, your Pokégear works as a radio!
HGSS.573.0008:
E-he-he-he...
I got in trouble for playing in the\r
basement of the department store.
HGSS.573.0009:
The man at that tent rates your
Pokémon names.\f
He can even rename your Pokémon.
HGSS.573.0010:
I think I’ll give my Pokémon cool
nicknames as a reward if they do\r
well in the Pokéathlon.
HGSS.573.0011:
Whew! This is one big town.
I don’t know where anything is.
HGSS.573.0012:
I know that you can find the
Pokéathlon Dome when you take\r
Route 35 north and go past the\r
left gate...\f
But I seem to get lost every time
I come to this town...
HGSS.573.0013: So this is the Radio Tower...\f
HGSS.573.0014:
What do you want, you pest?
Scram!\f
HGSS.573.0015:
What are you doing?
Get to your position right away!\f
HGSS.573.0016:
Pokémon? They’re nothing more than
tools for making money!
HGSS.573.0017:
We are on guard here.
Don’t you worry!
HGSS.573.0018:
Take over the Radio Tower...\f
What? It’s none of your business!
HGSS.573.0019:
You look awfully young...
Are you new?
HGSS.573.0020:
Hey, brat! You don’t belong here!\r
Get lost!
HGSS.573.0021:
Hey, hey!
I’ve got this covered!\f
Why don’t you go to the Radio Tower?
HGSS.573.0022:
Friendship with Pokémon?\f
That makes me laugh!
HGSS.573.0023:
Our dream will soon come true...
It was such a long struggle...
HGSS.573.0024:
Who are you? A newcomer?\f
We’ve run out of Team Rocket
uniforms.\f
One of my guys is going to get more...\f
What’s taking him so long?\f
The studio in the tunnel is just around
the corner.
HGSS.573.0025:
For a young one like you to decide
to become a member of Team Rocket...\r
That’s great, kiddo!
HGSS.573.0026:
Get out of my way!\f
We, as Gym Trainers, will never allow
Team Rocket to do nasty things here\r
in our city!
HGSS.573.0027:
Tee hee!\f
You Gym Trainers can be a problem.
Stay in the Gym and stay out of\r
the way!
HGSS.573.0028:
The Gym Leader, Whitney, went flying by
saying, “I have got to\r
get a Radio Card!”
HGSS.573.0029:
Wh-what are you trying to do?
Can’t you see this cool, pitch-black\r
uniform I’m wearing?\f
You’re not afraid of Team Rocket? Huh?
HGSS.573.0030:
You don’t appear scary enough to be a
Team Rocket member in that uniform...\r
Make a scarier face and say, “Yeee!”\f
All the while, clenching your teeth!
HGSS.573.0031:
Where do you think you’re going?
We are right in the middle of\r
the mission!
HGSS.573.0032:
Where do you think you are going?
The Radio Tower is not here!
HGSS.573.0033:
The GTS lets you trade Pokémon
all over the world!\f
...Except that we have something
more important to do right now!
HGSS.573.0034:
If you love to trade so much, wait until
the Radio Tower mission is over.\f
Then you’ll have plenty of time!
HGSS.573.0035:
Slow down!\f
I’m the only one who was sent here.\r
Don’t give me any more trouble, OK?\f
